note: 히어로 근접 스윙 모션 4프레임. 무기는 코드에서 손 위치에 오버레이하므로 맨손 스윙으로 생성 (전 근접무기 공용). identity=hero_idle_strip.

jobs.prompt: Pixel art 4-frame melee attack swing animation sprite strip: exactly 4 frames arranged in a single horizontal row (1x4 grid), 4 equal-width columns, one full-body character per column, generous empty magenta space between and around every column so the columns never touch, no drop shadows on the background. The SAME character appears in all 4 frames at exactly the same size and identity: the cute brave elementary school student adventurer boy shown in the small reference sprite, messy brown hair, small flowing red cape, white short-sleeve shirt, blue shorts and red sneakers, facing the viewer. He performs a big powerful overhead swing with his RIGHT arm as if slashing with an invisible sword, his hand stays an EMPTY clenched fist in every frame, absolutely no weapon, no stick, no sword and no object in his hands. FRAME 1 WINDUP - his right fist raised high above his right shoulder next to his head, elbow bent, torso twisted slightly back to his right, knees slightly bent, cape swung to the left. FRAME 2 MID-SWING - his right arm fully extended straight out to his right side at shoulder height in the middle of a fast arc, body leaning into the swing, hair and cape whipping with the motion. FRAME 3 FOLLOW-THROUGH - his right arm swept down low across the front of his body ending near his left hip, torso leaning forward, cape settling. FRAME 4 RECOVER - almost back to a relaxed standing pose, right arm loosely at his side, shoulders squared to the viewer. Feet planted on the same invisible ground line in all 4 frames, both feet visible in every frame.
